subject: [PATCH v5 1/3] cxl/core/region: move pmem region driver logic into region_pmem.c

2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch moves the logic for managing Persistent Memory (PMEM) regions from the overloaded region.c file into a new, dedicated region_pmem.c file. This separation makes it clear that this code only applies to PMEM regions and helps to declutter the original file. The move is done without introducing any functional changes, making it a refactoring effort aimed at improving maintainability and organization of the codebase.
